refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall enable monitoring, controlling, and optimizing energy consumption to meet the customer-defined energy efficiency target.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad; decomposing it into sub-functions clarifies how energy efficiency can be achieved through measurement, control, and optimization.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Verify energy consumption data collection accuracy, control algorithm effectiveness, and optimization results against the target energy_per_ton metric.
sub_frs: FR1: Measure energy consumption and tonnage moved accurately.
FR2: Control vehicle operation to minimize energy usage.
FR3: Optimize operational parameters to achieve energy efficiency target.

candidate_dps: DP1: Integrate energy and load sensors with telemetry system for real-time measurement.
DP2: Implement adaptive vehicle control algorithms to reduce energy consumption.
DP3: Use data analytics and feedback loops to optimize operational parameters.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Integrate energy and load sensors with telemetry system for real-time measurement.

potential_sources: Telemetry data shared between measurement and control functions
coupling_check.notes: DP1 logically supports FR1 and interfaces well with control and optimization DPs; coupling is manageable and expected.

assumptions_risks: Assumes sensors provide accurate and reliable data under all operating conditions.
Risk of sensor failure impacting energy efficiency measurement.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing sensor data acquisition separately to isolate sensor risks.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical components including energy and load sensors, and embedded telemetry hardware.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Sends real-time energy consumption and tonnage data to NGHE Solution and Teleoperation modules.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports data communication between Vehicle and external modules for control and monitoring.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment as sensors and telemetry hardware are physically within Vehicle; low diffusion risk.
Receives telemetry data but does not contain physical sensors; higher diffusion risk if sensor logic duplicated.
Primarily control interface; minimal containment of measurement functions.
No containment of energy measurement; unrelated to this DP.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Energy measurement DP is best contained within the Vehicle module to minimize diffusion and ensure data integrity.
containment_risks: Potential hardware failure in Vehicle sensors impacting data availability.
Integration complexity with telemetry interface requiring robust network link.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Define fallback data acquisition strategies and robust interface error handling.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP logically satisfies the refined FR1 with clear mapping and manageable coupling.

diffusion_risks: Minimal diffusion risk as DP is well contained within Vehicle module.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support Vehicle as the best IM boundary for this DP.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via sensor calibration tests and telemetry data validation.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of measurement function to Vehicle module with defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Add fallback mechanisms for sensor failure.
Clarify telemetry data format and error handling protocols.

decision.justification: While the decomposition and assignments are sound, additional sub-FRs for control and optimization need DP and IM assignments to complete the level.
next_level_sub_frs: FR2: Control vehicle operation to minimize energy usage.
FR3: Optimize operational parameters to achieve energy efficiency target.

revise.why: To select and assign DPs for the remaining sub-FRs and ensure architectural consistency.

assumptions: Sensors provide accurate data under all conditions.
Network link is reliable for telemetry data transmission.
evidence_needed: Sensor calibration and reliability test results.
